_note: FTQC non-Clifford universality: magic state |A>(magic_a 봉인) + T-injection. non-stabilizer·injection=EXACT 독립검증. distillation=하드웨어 범위 밖.

observation.honest_boundary: magic_a=Tier-0 EXACT 봉인. non-stabilizer·T-injection=EXACT(독립검증). magic state distillation(잡음→고순도)은 하드웨어 맥락→범위 밖(정체성).
observation.universality: Clifford(W7 QEC: transversal H/S/CNOT) + T(magic state injection) = universal gate set
